allow: PowerShell(python -m pip --version; python -m pip install aiohttp httpx cryptography pyyaml 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "from cryptography import x509; cert = x509.load_pem_x509_certificate\(open\('certs/server.pem','rb'\).read\(\)\); san = cert.extensions.get_extension_for_class\(x509.SubjectAlternativeName\); print\('SANs:', [str\(n.value\) for n in san.value]\)")
Bash(python -c "import genai_tester.certs as c; print\('SANS_DNS:', c.SANS_DNS\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\projects\\genai-tester"; $ruff = Resolve-Path ".venv\\Scripts\\ruff.exe"; & $ruff check genai_tester/ tools/; & $ruff format --check genai_tester/ tools/)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\projects\\genai-tester"; $server = Start-Process -FilePath ".venv\\Scripts\\python" -ArgumentList "-m genai_tester serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8443" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 2; $server.Id)
